expectations.text: Tri-driver pattern: auto-detects Neon serverless vs Neon HTTP vs local pg based on URL and NEXT_RUNTIME
expectations.evidence: client.ts lines 56-81: checks isNeonUrl() and NEXT_RUNTIME==='edge' for Neon serverless, isNeon && !isLocal for Neon HTTP, falls through to drizzleNodePg for local pg

expectations.text: Lazy proxy pattern: db instance doesn't eagerly connect on import
expectations.evidence: client.ts lines 88-95: export const db = new Proxy({} as DbClient, { get(_target, prop, receiver) { if (!_db) { _db = createClient(); } return Reflect.get(_db, prop, receiver); } })

expectations.text: casing snake_case: set in BOTH drizzle.config.ts AND client initialization
expectations.evidence: drizzle.config.ts line 12: casing: "snake_case". client.ts line 23: const CASING = "snake_case" used in all three driver calls

expectations.text: Files at services/database/ path: SE-2 convention
expectations.evidence: All database files under packages/nextjs/services/database/ including client.ts, drizzle.config.ts, schema/, repositories/, seed/, migrations/
repositories/userRepository.ts: exports userRepository with findAll, findById, findByAddress, create, update, updateByAddress, delete, upsertByAddress methods

expectations.text: Root proxy scripts for drizzle-kit commands (db:seed, db:wipe, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Root package.json lines 52-60: db:generate, db:migrate, db:push, db:pull, db:studio, db:seed, db:wipe, db:up, db:down all proxy to yarn workspace @se-2/nextjs

expectations.text: Docker Compose for local PostgreSQL development

expectations.evidence: client.ts lines 44-54: checks process.env.PRODUCTION_DATABASE_HOSTNAME, throws error if databaseUrl contains that hostname

expectations.text: All required dependencies: drizzle-orm, @neondatabase/serverless, pg, dotenv, drizzle-kit, drizzle-seed, @types/pg, tsx
expectations.evidence: packages/nextjs/package.json: drizzle-orm, @neondatabase/serverless, pg, dotenv in deps; drizzle-kit, drizzle-seed, @types/pg, tsx in devDeps
